children.text: The Director shall engage, as appropriate, experts in the social dimensions of science and technology and set up formal avenues for public input, as appropriate, to ensure that ethical, legal, and societal considerations are taken into account in the priorities and activities of the Directorate, including in the selection of the challenges and key technology focus areas under

children.tail: and the award-making process, and throughout all stages of supported projects.

children.text: Pub. L. 117–167, div. B, title III, § 10398
